_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Designing and executing tests involves applying appropriate test types and techniques to create and run tests that align to user needs and requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in writing automated tests for data applications, including unit tests for transformation logic, integration tests for pipeline components, and data validation tests using appropriate testing frameworks.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-004 (RM, cosine: 0.501), RM-T-003 (RM, cosine: 0.455).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.615). Shared vocabulary: [appropriate, tests]. DDaT-only terms [align, applying, create, designing, executing, involves] vs WIDAI-only terms [applications, automated, components, data, frameworks, integration] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.881, R=0.880). Balanced P/R — the 23-word DDaT element and 27-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.9%). "Designing and executing tests involves applying appropriate test types and techn" and "Skill in writing automated tests for data applications, including unit tests for" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.596 ≈ STS 0.615 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [appropriate, tests] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [appropriate, tests]. DDaT-only: [align, applying, create, designing, executing, involves]. WIDAI-only: [applications, automated, components, data, frameworks, integration].
